apply_notes: Apply metadata + canonical (www) per page. CRITICAL global stat consistency: every '7+ yıl'/'7 yıl'->'5+ yıl'/'5 yıl', '2018'->'2021'; KEEP all '10.000+'. Preserve Turkish chars.
